geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, LB Nagar zone boundary shapefiles, Rangareddy district fringe

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Rangareddy district tables, GHMC LB Nagar zone estimates, residential growth at 2.8% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, LB Nagar area employment survey

commute_profile.data_source: HMR Red Line ridership 2023 (LB Nagar is terminus station), TSRTC route data for south Hyderabad, CMP Hyderabad 2013

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from mid-lower income residential zone, moderate-high fare sensitivity, long commute distance amplifying transport cost concerns, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from residential commuter zone patterns, neighbourhood networks strengthened by shared metro commute experience

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Dilsukhnagar commercial hub footfall, one of the busiest commercial areas in south Hyderabad
HMR LB Nagar terminus station exit surveys, vendor cluster activity
Estimated from LB Nagar area weekly market (shandy) activity

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Middle Income Residential template from AGENT_SPEC.md, applicable to LB Nagar's mid-lower income residential character

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GHMC ward councillor count, RWA presence in apartment colonies, Dilsukhnagar market association
